What stands out the most about any of the guitarists that played with Chuck, in terms of their playing alongside him?

comments.body: Shannon loves sweep picking.
Paul Masvidal’s fretboard is made out of butter
James Murphy's solos always complimented Chuck's.
James Murphy”s playing on Spiritual Healing was a huge progression from what came before and was perfect for that record.
There's a lot of room for improvement when the previous studio guitarist was Rick Rozz.
Haha, with all due respect to Rick who’s playing I enjoy……you’re not exactly wrong

James Murphy, his solo are so unique in spiritual healing.
I wish he could give some guitar lessons 🤘

Some of the greatest and most respected guitarists in 90s death metal. 

And Rick Rozz.
what does this mean
Andy LaRocque's work on ITP is magical

How smooth the guy plays.
He glides over ridiculous amounts of notes.
bobby is the craziest player ive ever heard

Andy Laroque was the best compliment to Chuck’s playing IMHO. His note selection and sense of melody is unmatched and perfectly contrasts Chuck’s riffing style.

Paul’s solo on “Flattening” is alien AF.
I'm pretty sure he would have preferred to only play rhythms on Leprosy, or at least that's what I remember him saying on Facebook
Yeah, ridiculous amounts of notes and very smooth legato playing!
Dive bombing is what he does. If he’s good with it then I’m good with it!
Best album in terms of solos imo
ah i see

submission.title: This is a little assignment I made for school. Thought you guys would appreciate it.

comments.body: Fuck yeah
It’s cool, I wonder what class this could be for?
\\m/ perfect!
Very cool. What software did you use?
It's a digital 2D visual effects class
I used photoshop to set up the isolated layers of the pic and then after effects to add lighting and make everything move
Really beautiful, may I use it for my guitar cover video?
Feel free, send me the link when you're done
Hey Thank you sundog 👌
Honestly you could drop the rotation and post this to wallpaper engine
Really cool! High school? College?
An elective in college
[https://youtu.be/k8xjqfUB-ww](https://youtu.be/k8xjqfUB-ww)

itsbeautifulivelookedatthisforfivehoursnow.jpg

Messaged the mods again to ask for image/GIF uploading in comments ability. It's not that big a request is it?

Seriously OP, I love this and would love if you could talk about what you did to make it? Or a video demonstration?

I replied to another guy with the basic concept but to explain it more in depth: I first looked up a widescreen desktop version of the Scream Bloody Gore cover. From the looks of the original image I think somebody just photoshopped and cloned/content-aware-filled the rest of the image outside of the original square album art. So I got this image and basically masked out the four guys, separating them all into separate layers. But when you mask out something from an image, it leaves a blank space. So I had to clone stamp/content aware fill the space behind the four guys so I could have an empty background. It looked like crap but it's okay because with the amount of effects and motion in the final video no one could notice.



After I separated the subject into layers and filled in the background, I brought the photoshop file into After Effects. With after effects you can convert the photoshop layers into 3D objects, and so essentially I just moved the background to the very back, moved the guy on the throne to just in front of the background. The two laughing guys I had in the middle, and I put the bald guy kind of in the front. In after effects, you can also create a virtual camera, and you're able to move it, which is what you see in the video. The camera is just moving backwards (and rotating a little) and it gives off this 3D effect because all the guys are at a different depth.



I also used this tool in after effects that allows you to slightly distort parts of a layer over time, which is how I made the guy on the right slightly move his cup and the guy on the left to slightly lean his head back. Add in some post-processing effects like lighting, colour grading and some grain. And that's all she wrote basically.
Could definitely take a crack at that if people wanted that as a wallpaper lol
Holy cow! What a sick cover
Dude you're a fucking genius, I love this
I made this my wallpaper! Nice! Can you make the other covers or make one with all the covers?

I think if I have some free time  in the future i definitely could. But you can look up ‘Death album cover wallpaper’ and probably find some cool desktop wallpapers. I mean, someone else made the wallpaper version of Scream Bloody Gore and that’s what I used for this video.
I like the live 2D version you made. I could. Was just curious. No worries. I appreciate it.
Sweet!
